title: [Contributions of molecular biology to the management of colorectal cancer].
author_string: Grancher, Adrien, Cuissy, Steven, Sefrioui, David, Di Fiore, Frédéric
abstract: CONTRIBUTIONS OF MOLECULAR BIOLOGY TO THE MANAGEMENT OF COLORECTAL CANCER. Colorectal cancer (CRC) is a major public health problem affecting almost 43.000 people a year and causing 17.000 deaths. Advances in molecular biology have made it possible to identify some of the mechanisms involved in colorectal carcinogenesis and tumor proliferation. Some molecular alterations are now routinely investigated to adapt follow-up and therapeutic decisions in both localized and metastatic CRC.
